topic: 初始场景改造 — 支持多入口场景

decision_trail.reason: 数据契约已验证,改动面最小,与grill Q4.1兼容

decision_trail.decision: 规则系统已建好未接入(待接线层)

decision_trail.reason: A复用现有(改动最小),D/F短链(3步/2步),覆盖新项目/小修复/探索三大入口
当前7字段无法区分D/E/F入口

decision_trail.decision: 路径2统一selector节点(非每场景自带intent)
decision_trail.reason: 绕开nodes[0]约定风险,与guidance-overlay兼容,改动更小

key_conclusions.evidence: 数据契约验证+改动面最小+grill Q4.1兼容+catalog 1:1映射

key_conclusions.conclusion: 规则系统是待接线层,本次改造核心是接通它

key_conclusions.evidence: scenario变量21+消费点+hasSelectedScenario 7守卫点+activeStepId生命周期

key_conclusions.conclusion: ruleApplies硬编码switch是扩展性瓶颈(MVP可接受)

recommendations.action: 新建 scenarioRegistry: ScenarioModel[] 含3场景(A_full_project复用/D_small_fix新建/F_explore_only新建)

steps.description: 新建scenarioRegistry数组, unclearRequirementsScenario重命名为fullProjectScenario作为A场景

recommendations.action: App() state重构: hasSelectedScenario:boolean → selectedScenarioId:string|null, scenario变量改useMemo
recommendations.rationale: 解耦硬编码点src/main.tsx:764,支持多场景查找
当前7字段无法区分D/E/F入口

steps.description: taskType映射到场景选择(new→A, bugfix→D, explore→F)

recommendations.action: 路径2统一selector节点: 空态时渲染独立场景选择器(3选项A/D/F),选中后切换到对应ScenarioModel

steps.description: guidance-overlay替换为场景选择器(3卡片A/D/F)

recommendations.action: ruleApplies扩展: 加D场景case(放宽plan前置hasAnalyze)+F场景case
recommendations.rationale: D场景rule-plan当前要求hasAnalyze,小修复无analyze需放宽

recommendations.action: 场景切换时state重置策略: setActiveStepId+setSelectedNodeId(null)+setPopover(null), canvasTransform保留
recommendations.rationale: activeStepId不可跨场景复用,canvasTransform是用户视角应保留

recommendations.action: ruleApplies长期改声明式匹配(替代switch on rule.id)
recommendations.rationale: 硬编码switch扩展性瓶颈,MVP可接受技术债

steps.description: 改为按rule.scenarioId+rule.condition字段声明式匹配

implementation_scope.rationale: ScenarioRegistry模型MVP,解决单场景硬编码
implementation_scope.change_summary: src/main.tsx: 新建scenarioRegistry+D/F ScenarioModel+selectedScenarioId state+useMemo+7守卫点适配+场景选择UI

implementation_scope.rationale: 区分入口意图+D场景无analyze前置
